{{Quote|You ''understand'', ya big furball? There's ''no choice!'' You gotta ''blast'' me... and do it ''fast!'' Dammit, Chewie... shoot!|Han Solo|<ref name="Star Wars (1977) 22">[[Star Wars (1977) 22|''Star Wars'' (1977) 22]]</ref>}}
'''''Star Wars 22: To the Last Gladiator''''' is the twenty-second issue in the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series of comics.

==Plot summary==
[[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] are involved in the main event of [[The Big Game]] along with many other gladiators, and the two team up against the rest of the combatants to stay alive. But they realize that, according to the rules, only one of them will be permitted to leave the game alive. [[Simon Greyshade/Legends|Simon Greyshade]], who has been orchestrating events on [[The Wheel/Legends|The Wheel]], presents [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia]] with a proposition: escape with Greyshade and his stolen treasure and her [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] friends will go free. As she contemplates her decision, she watches the main event with Han and Chewbacca, and witnesses Han apparently slain by his [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] companion.
